description_long: This object is a compact, military-style shotgun with a robust metal body and a dark, matte finish. The receiver and barrel are primarily constructed from blackened steel, with a ribbed foregrip and a folding metal stock at the rear. The grip is angled and appears to be made of a brown polymer or wood, providing ergonomic support for the user. The barrel is relatively short, and the front sight is a simple post, while the rear features a minimalistic ring. The trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated, enclosing a standard trigger. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical joints, suggesting durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A compact, black military-style shotgun with a folding metal stock, ribbed foregrip, and brown ergonomic grip. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a short barrel and minimalistic sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the folding stock, ribbed foregrip, and brown grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the folding stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the folding stock and grip clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the ring-shaped rear of the folding stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated, medium size, no finger grooves or reinforcement
